CustomField.description: Flat Rate Charge: This rate applies up to the utilization level specified in the Threshold Rate Utilization field. This field effectively overrides the Threshold Rate (Precise) field, which originally has a precision of six decimal places.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Flat Rate Charge: This rate applies up to the utilization level specified in the Threshold Rate Utilization field. This field effectively overrides the Threshold Rate (Precise) field, which originally has a precision of six decimal places.
CustomField.label: Threshold Rate
